economic_notes: Nuchatlaht First Nation owns 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Ltd. Also owns 1075124 B.C. Ltd., 1407315 B.C. Ltd., and Nuchatlaht First Nation Community Logging Corporation. Pension plan administered by Manulife Financial with 4% employer contribution.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Auditor is MPS Chartered Professional Accountants based in Parksville, BC. ISC funding flows through Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council and cannot be separately identified. Government transfers cannot be fully disaggregated from the income statement as presented - Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council operating ($1,400,150) is the primary funding source which includes ISC pass-through. Three entities fully consolidated (1075124 B.C. Ltd., 1407315 B.C. Ltd., Nuchatlaht First Nation Community Logging Corporation); two entities on modified equity method (Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and Hayu Fishing Ltd.). Prior year revenue was significantly higher ($5,553,050) due to logging income of $2,799,052. No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements. Housing expenses derived from band-owned housing ($36,166) and housing projects ($27,469) combined. Social housing mortgage fully paid off during the year.
